keyEvents.text: Goal! Haiti 1, Costa Rica 0. Frantzdy Pierrot (Haiti) right footed shot from very close range to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Ruben Providence.
First Half ends, Haiti 1, Costa Rica 0.
Substitution, Costa Rica. Manfred Ugalde replaces Kenneth Vargas.

Substitution, Haiti. Christopher Attys replaces Léverton Pierre.
Substitution, Haiti. Stéphane Lambese replaces Carlens Arcus.
Second Half ends, Haiti 1, Costa Rica 0.
